programme.title: Ang Dalawang Mrs. Reyes
programme.desc: After discovering their husbands have been having an affair with each other, two friends attempt to sabotage the relationship.

programme.title: Us Again
programme.desc: In Us Again, Jane Oineza and RK Bagatsing are two friends who kept their romantic feelings for one another for years. When they decide to act upon their feelings, however, they do it in the wort time, just as he is starting out a relationship with another woman.

programme.title: First Love
programme.desc: Nick who is a reserved businessman meets the impulsive and optimistic Ali who is living with a congenital heart disease.

programme.title: Shake, Rattle & Roll X
programme.desc: An anthology of three terrifying tales. A small hospital is suddenly attacked by a gang of bloodthirsty creatures. A group of high school students spending the night at their school are haunted by the spirit of demented nun. A small town's resident monster slayer is called once again to save the town from destruction.

programme.title: HGTV HD
programme.desc: HGTV is the premier source for home-related inspiration, instruction and entertainment. With the growing demand for high quality home lifestyle entertainment in Asia, HGTV is the first regional channel dedicated exclusively to the growing home and lifestyle category in Asia. Available in 10 countries in Asia Pacific, HGTV offers a robust line up of top-rated programs about property, hybrid construction, design and extreme spaces. Hit programs such as Property Brothers, Fixer Upper, Flip or Flop and House Hunters entertain and inspire viewers with fresh ideas and authentic stories on how to find and love their own dream home. HGTV is part of Scripps Networks Interactive, one of the world’s leading producers of lifestyle content. More information available on www.hgtv.asia or Facebook page www.facebook.com/hgtvasia.

programme.title: Marita
programme.desc: An actress commits suicide in a theatre full of people. Now she haunts the venue and those who visit.

programme.title: 100 Tula Para Kay Stella
programme.desc: Throughout his four years in college, Fidel, a stuttering student, tries to finish 100 poems dedicated to Stella, an aspiring but frustrated rock star, to win her heart.

programme.title: Who's That Girl?
programme.desc: A young successful career woman and her longtime crush get caught up in a complicated case of mistaken identity. As they try to undo their mistakes, the two end up finding a real connection.

programme.title: Till I Met You
programme.desc: Three friends — Iris, a girl; Basti, a boy; and Ali, a closeted homosexual — eventually fall in love with each other and find themselves in an unusual love triangle.

programme.title: Girlfriend Na Pwede Na
programme.desc: Pam has been waiting for her boyfriend of seven years to propose, only to discover that he thinks that she's not yet the one.
